name: 公司辦公室/會議室對峙
description: 權力不對等的空間裡，清潔工對抗高管和產品經理。職場等級制度讓女主的反抗更具戲劇張力——身份最低的人卻專業能力最強。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Employee handbook. Section 46. Employee attire must be appropriate. / I'm trying to save her. The country's top shme medical cosmetics lab and you don't even know about lead poisoning.
examples.context: 權力不對等的空間裡，清潔工對抗高管和產品經理。職場等級制度讓女主的反抗更具戲劇張力——身份最低的人卻專業能力最強。
